name: Halley Mission: 2061
short_description: Embark on a sci-fi survival adventure on Halley's Comet as a retired astronaut on a top-secret mission. Build, manage limited resources, and survive the desolate space environment to complete your mission.
detailed_description:
Halley Mission: 2061 launches you into an epic sci-fi adventure among the stars! In this survival crafting RPG, you play as a retired astronaut called back into action for a top-secret mission near the perihelion of Halley's Comet.

Stranded in the vast, desolate reaches of space, you'll face survival challenges like never before. Will you carefully ration your limited supplies, or use your ingenuity to build a fully functional space base and achieve self-sufficiency? Every decision matters — managing your resources and time wisely will be the key to completing your mission.
about_the_game:

Every decision matters — managing your resources and time wisely will be the key to completing your mission.
supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Ukrainian, Russian, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Indonesian, Turkish, Greek, Norwegian, Czech, Japanese, Polish, Thai, Swedish, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Romanian, Finnish, Dutch, Portuguese - Portugal, Vietnamese, Arabic, Korean, Croatian, Icelandic, Catalan, Afrikaans, Hindi, Basque, Hebrew, Latvian, Slovak, Slovenian, Estonian, Belarusian, Lithuanian
*languages with full audio support
